description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python Docker image and three stages: static analysis, build, and test. Add a static analysis job that runs pip install pylint in before_script, then executes pylint calculator.py, allows failure, and runs in the static analysis stage. Add a build job in the build stage that runs python -m compileall calculator.py. Add a module tests job in the test stage that installs coverage, sets COVRUN="coverage run -a", then runs test $($COVRUN calculator.py 1 + 1) = 2, test $($COVRUN calculator.py 100 - 10) = 90, test $($COVRUN calculator.py 25 \* 5) = 125, (! $COVRUN calculator.py 30 / 5), and finally runs coverage report. Add a unit tests job in the test stage that installs pytest and runs py.test unit_tests.py.
